name: Triton
research_note: Single primary source kingshot-data. | 9x3x3 update: 2nd source added from lootbar.gg/blog/en/kingshot-gen-6-heroes-list-and-ranking.html — kingshot-data + lootbar.gg Gen 5/6 guide convergence confirmed on mechanics and max values (tier-by-tier scaling remains kingshot-data single-source for some fields).

base_stats.notable: Absolute highest base Health documented (99910). With Tidal Scepter +18022, raw HP pool exceeds 117,900.

conquest.name: Tidewill
conquest.description: Triton is surrounded by a barrier of waves that surges forward, gaining invulnerability for 2 seconds before dealing AOE damage.

conquest.name: Regal Wrath
conquest.description: Triton channels the rage of the ruler within, increasing Attack and Defense for 4 seconds.

conquest.name: Striking Hit
conquest.description: Triton lashes the disobedient with shattering violence, dealing damage to a random enemy with every normal attack.

expedition.name: Command of Power
expedition.scaling_note: Sources describe as range text (e.g., '3-15%'). Tier-by-tier scaling array not available in any consulted source. Max value verified by 2+ sources (kingshot-data + kingshotwiki/lootbar); tier progression is not verifiable — removed interpolated array to avoid false precision.

exclusive_gear_skills.description: Increases the Defense of defender troops. Unlocked only when Tidal Scepter is equipped.

order: Max Command of Power first (+25% squad Defense)
Then Warfare of Power (30% skill damage)

gear_recommendations.reasoning: Standard infantry archetype at legendary tier. Derived from community gear build templates (allclash.com Zoe guide as canonical base for infantry, confirmed by community consensus across allclash, heaven-guardian, kingshothandbook build guides).
sources: allclash.com Zoe build guide (canonical infantry template)

best_partners.theoretical_synergy: Triton is the ultimate infantry tank. His Tidewill invulnerability window + Regal Wrath self-buff + absurd HP pool make him nearly unkillable. Pairs with Hilde for sustain or with a rally-lead Vivian/Yang for offensive support.
best_partners.source: kingshothandbook.com effect_op stacking math + community lineup guides

counters.reason: No public source documents explicit hero-vs-hero counter matchups for Kingshot. Community discussions reference troop-type rock-paper-scissors (Infantry > Cavalry > Archer > Infantry) and formation-based counters but not specific hero counters. Check Discord/Reddit for player-tested matchups.

f2p_investment.reasoning: heroes.js f2p=false despite Hall of Heroes access. Premium investment tier.

rally.reasoning: Usable offensive role via Regal Wrath Attack boost.

garrison.reasoning: The strongest frontline unit in Gen 6. Dominates garrison defense.

bear_hunt.reasoning: Strong bear hunt via high HP + damage output.

lore_background.title: The Ocean-King
lore_background.derived_character_themes: Oceanic ruler archetype with themes of waves, authority, and ancient power. Skill flavor text references "Triton surrounds himself with a barrier of waves", "Triton channels the rage of the ruler within", "ancient whale-calls echo through the barricades", "shares the fruits of authority", and "Great power stems from a willingness to keep oaths". His exclusive gear is the "Tidal Scepter". Together these suggest a Poseidon-like sea-king figure with ancient artifacts of power.
lore_background.source: derived from skill flavor text (kingshotdata.com, kingshotguide.org)

deep_analysis: Triton is the absolute tank ceiling of Kingshot — a Gen 6 Legendary Infantry hero with the highest base Health of any documented hero (99910), the highest exclusive-gear Health bonus (+18022 from Tidal Scepter), and a combined raw HP pool exceeding 117,900 before Expedition multipliers. His Conquest tree: Tidewill grants him a 2-second invulnerability window before unleashing up to Attack × 140% AOE damage, Regal Wrath self-buffs +24% Attack and +48% Defense for 4 seconds, and Striking Hit deals up to Attack × 28% bonus damage on every normal attack. His Expedition tree buffs the whole army: Command of Power adds +25% squad Defense, Warfare of Power adds +30% skill damage for all squads, and Oath of Power adds +20% Infantry health and +30% Cavalry/Archer health. His exclusive gear Tidal Scepter adds +921 Attack, +1201 Defense, +18022 Health, +133.50% Lethality, +133.50% Health, and unlocks Magnetic Reformation (+30% damage) plus Whale Call (+15% defender troops' Defense). heroes.js calls him 'the strongest frontline unit in Gen 6' — S Garrison, A Rally, A Bear Hunt. Premium-gated through Hall of Heroes. Lore not found in consulted sources — kit themes (Tidewill, Tidal Scepter, Whale Call, Regal Wrath) suggest a tidal king or ocean-ruler archetype.
unverified_fields: Expedition scaling arrays interpolated from range text
